message:
feat(cli): implement ntm approve command (ntm-55zg)

Add CLI command for managing approval requests:
- ntm approve <token>     - approve a pending request
- ntm approve list        - list all pending approvals
- ntm approve deny <token> - deny with optional reason
- ntm approve show <token> - show approval details
- ntm approve history     - show approval history

Includes JSON output mode (--json flag) for robot consumption.

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
